subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! For a time all communication was wholly cut off, and hearts were sore troubled and agitated until [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مدتی بود که مخابره بکلی منقطع و قلوب متاثر و مضطرب تا آنگه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @Hands of the Cause
